get.description: Returns 200 when the API process is running.
Returns 200 when all downstream dependencies are reachable.

schema.title: Response Register Api V1 Auth Register Post

post.description: Authenticate and return JWT access + refresh tokens.

schema.title: Response Login Api V1 Auth Login Post

post.description: Invalidate the current session / refresh token.
Issue a new access token using a valid refresh token.

schema.title: Response Refresh Token Api V1 Auth Token Refresh Post

post.description: Verify email address using the token sent by email.

schema.title: Response Verify Email Api V1 Auth Verify Email Post
Response Password Reset Request Api V1 Auth Password Reset Request Post
Response Password Reset Api V1 Auth Password Reset Post

post.description: Initiate MFA TOTP setup — returns QR code URI.

schema.title: Response Mfa Setup Api V1 Auth Mfa Setup Post
Response Mfa Verify Api V1 Auth Mfa Verify Post

get.description: Initiate OAuth flow for a provider (google, github, microsoft).
Handle OAuth callback and return platform tokens.

schema.title: Response Oauth Callback Api V1 Auth Oauth  Provider  Callback Get
Response Get Me Api V1 Users Me Get
Response Update Me Api V1 Users Me Patch

get.description: List all API keys for the current user.

schema.title: Response List Api Keys Api V1 Users Me Api Keys Get

post.description: Create a new API key. The raw key is only returned once.

schema.title: Response Create Api Key Api V1 Users Me Api Keys Post

source_port.title: Source Port
